title: Speak - Lesson 1
description: Learn key vocabulary and concepts for Speak - Lesson 1. Listen carefully and read along in English and Vietnamese.
keyPoints: और क्या चल रहा है? (aur kya chal raha hai?) = What else is going on? / What's up? / Có chuyện gì mới không?
याद रखना। (yaad rakhna) = Remember. / Hãy nhớ lấy.
कोई बात नहीं, चलता है। (koi baat nahin, chalta hai) = No problem, it happens. / Không sao đâu, chuyện thường thôi.

title: Vocabulary & Grammar - Part 1
explanation: Focus on speaking and writing these essential terms carefully. Pay attention to gender endings and postpositions.
simpleRule: Remember: और क्या चल रहा है? means 'What else is going on? / What's up?' (Có chuyện gì mới không?).

english: What else is going on? / What's up?

prompt_en: Choose the correct translation for 'और क्या चल रहा है?'
prompt_vi: Chọn bản dịch đúng cho 'और क्या चल रहा है?'
answer: What else is going on? / What's up?
options: What else is going on? / What's up?
options_vi: Không sao đâu, chuyện thường thôi.

vietnamese: Không sao đâu, chuyện thường thôi.

instruction: Match the Hindi words with their meanings

pairs.english: What else is going on? / What's up? (Có chuyện gì mới không?)
No problem, it happens. (Không sao đâu, chuyện thường thôi.)

options_en: What else is going on? / What's up?
options_vi: Không sao đâu, chuyện thường thôi.

englishSentence: My name is John / Tên tôi là John

pairs.english: No problem, it happens. (Không sao đâu, chuyện thường thôi.)

englishSentence: Please speak slowly / Làm ơn nói chậm lại

title: Lesson Summary
takeaways: You learned basic vocabulary terms: और क्या चल रहा है?, कोई बात नहीं, चलता है।, बंद करना​​​​.
You completed interactive listening and matching drills.
You practiced word ordering for the sentence: 'Please speak slowly'.
